full_text:
Li Peng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Peng. Officer of Sima Wang, rode to Wang Zhen’s aid but was killed by Jiang Wei. Li Peng is a fictional character. Li Peng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
